name: first-pass-quality
description: Enforces task scope, fresh evidence, one-shot production identity, and honest completion in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Task locks, evidence gates, and production-safe completion for Codex.
interface.longDescription: First-Pass Quality adds a Codex skill and lifecycle hooks: clarify once, create phase-aware Task Locks, reconcile new input, separate pre-publish PR evidence from final acceptance, preserve project workflow skills, bind production calls to exact typed inputs with one-shot confirmation, verify delegated work in the parent, and prevent false-ready answers.
defaultPrompt: Use $first-pass-quality-gate to lock scope, verify fresh evidence, and report an honest status.
